title: Arcpocalypse
description: Let the chaos god spring anew
body:
# The Arcpocalypse
have you ever wanted to become Neco Arc? This is your chance!

Craft two Abyss Lifts and make sure that they're next to each other and directly above the void. Place a cat in one, place yourself in another, and let yourself stare at the Void, and thus let the Void stare back.

![Created for ModFest: Singularity](https://blob.jortage.com/blobs/5/d4d/5d4d14d96db2e2024d87cf5606cb7ce6421633a002e328947f85d210ba250ecb9f86de8df210dd031be2d4eafb0980494e7a1e8e99590a550abaa42d82768b9f)


Requires [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui) and [QSL/QFAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl)
